Footer.claim: Czech engineering partner for industrial machinery. Design, manufacturing and service since 1993.

Newsletter.title: What's new in the workshop.
Newsletter.description: A short monthly digest of projects and articles. No spam.
Newsletter.consent: I agree to receive the newsletter and the processing of my email for this purpose.

Home.metaDescription: Design, manufacturing and service of conveyor systems, special-purpose machines, robotic cells and welded structures. From Plzeň since 1993.

hero.title: Machinery that moves industry.
hero.subtitle: We design, build and service conveyor systems, special-purpose machines and welded structures for automotive, energy and heavy industry manufacturers.

manifesto.title: 32 years of engineering craft.
manifesto.p1: We're not a commodity supplier. We're an engineering partner. Every project starts at a table with the customer, working out what they actually need to manufacture, move or weld. Not what's in our catalog.
manifesto.p2: We've been building machines in Plzeň since 1993. We've delivered over a thousand special-purpose machines and several hundred welded structures to production plants in the Czech Republic and abroad. The people who weld and program robots for us today have been doing this work for fifteen, twenty years. That's not a marketing claim — it's why customers call us back.

services.title: Five areas where we deliver.
services.intro: We specialise in five segments of industrial engineering. A typical project combines two or three.

empty.title: First case studies coming soon.
empty.body: We're currently preparing a detailed report from the latest major realisation.

reel.title: A few frames from our hall.

logos.title: Our machines run in plants where mistakes aren't an option.

news.title: Latest articles.
news.empty: First articles will appear here soon.

cta.title: Let's talk about it.
cta.body: Reach out even with a rough brief. A single call is usually enough to produce a meaningful quote.

AboutUs.metaDescription: STRKAN s.r.o. — engineering firm from Plzeň, since 1993. A team of engineers, designers and welders who build custom industrial machinery.

hero.title: Engineering craft from Plzeň, since 1993.
hero.subtitle: People, hall, machines. Three things our work has rested on for 32 years.

story.title: How we got here.
story.p1: STRKAN started as a small engineering workshop serving local manufacturers in Plzeň. We've grown since, but we've never forgotten that machines are designed and built by people, not by spreadsheets.
story.p2: Today we operate two halls in Plzeň, 45 employees and a portfolio of over a thousand delivered units. Our customers include automotive sub-suppliers, energy component manufacturers and heavy industry firms across Europe.
story.p3: Our yardstick isn't growth at any cost. We measure project quality and the number of customers who return. Over the past five years, 70 % of our customers have contacted us for a follow-up project.

values.title: Where we won't negotiate a discount.
values.intro: Three rules we run every project by. It's not brand voice — it's a line we don't cross.

team.title: The people who design and build.

certifications.title: We meet standards that apply across Europe.

cta.title: Come and see for yourself.
cta.body: An in-person workshop tour is the best way to judge whether we're the right partner for your project.

founded.title: Company founded
founded.description: Engineering workshop for local manufacturers in Plzeň.

firstAuto.title: First automotive contract
firstAuto.description: Entry into the supply chain for passenger car manufacturing.

iso3834.title: EN ISO 3834-2 certification
iso3834.description: Full welding qualification for load-bearing structures.

robotics.title: Robotic workstation opened
robotics.description: First in-house robotic cell — Yaskawa MA2010.

cncMazak.title: 5-axis CNC Mazak Variaxis
cncMazak.description: Investment in high-end machining of complex parts.

craft.title: Craft
craft.description: The machine matches the project documentation. Not an average compromise, not the cheapest variant, not "it'll do". What's in the BOM is what you'll find in the machine.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: A deadline we promise is a deadline we keep. In 94 % of contracts over the past five years we delivered in the planned week.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Tolerances aren't done by eye. We measure every critical dimension. If we're not satisfied, neither should the customer be.

team.title: Team
team.description: The people who work for us have been here fifteen, twenty years. Machines and know-how stay in our hall, not in the head of a colleague who's just leaving.

ceo.bio: Leads strategic decisions, key client relationships and capital investments into machinery.

leadEngineer.bio: Responsible for 3D designs in SolidWorks, calculations and coordination of the engineering team.

headOfProduction.bio: Runs the shop floor, production planning and quality of delivered work.

cnc.title: CNC machining
items: DMG Mori CTX (turning up to Ø 320 mm)

Services.metaDescription: Design, manufacturing and service of five types of industrial machinery — from conveyor systems to plate positioners.

hero.title: Five segments of industrial engineering.
hero.subtitle: We specialise in five areas. Most projects combine them — a typical job is a welded structure with integrated conveyor systems and a robotic cell.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.description: We go through the brief and your hall's constraints. A call and a few photos produce a first estimate.

design.title: Design
design.description: Our engineers prepare a 3D model in SolidWorks and a technical budget.

production.title: Production
production.description: Welding, machining, assembly and pre-acceptance at our shop in Plzeň.

installation.title: Installation
installation.description: Transport, assembly at the customer's site, operator training.

service.title: Service
service.description: Post-warranty service, spare parts, remote diagnostics via PLC.

cta.title: Have a specific brief?
cta.body: Fill in the short configurator — five minutes is enough for us to produce a first ballpark.

dopravni-technika.title: Conveyor systems
dopravni-technika.perex: Belt, roller and chain conveyors for production lines. From single units to complex systems with integrated automation.
dopravni-technika.imageLabel: Belt conveyor on the shop floor

jednoucelove-stroje.title: Special-purpose machines
jednoucelove-stroje.perex: Machines built for one specific manufacturing task — assembly, inspection, testing. When no off-the-shelf solution exists.

svarovane-konstrukce.title: Welded structures
svarovane-konstrukce.perex: Steel structures for production halls, assembly frames, support structures. Welder certification EN ISO 3834-2.

automatizace-a-robotika.title: Automation and robotics
automatizace-a-robotika.perex: Robotic welding cells and material handling stations integrated into production lines. Yaskawa, KUKA, FANUC.

deskova-polohovadla.title: Plate positioners
deskova-polohovadla.perex: Positioners for welding large parts up to 20 tonnes. Manual and CNC control synchronised with a robot.

examples.title: Where this service has been used.

cta.title: Request this service
cta.body: We adapt the configurator to the segment you choose. It takes around five minutes.

capabilities: Custom design tailored to your hall's layout
Belt, roller, chain and screw conveyors
Control with Siemens or Allen-Bradley PLC + HMI
Service and 24/7 spare-parts availability

faq.a: Typically 4–6 months from order confirmation, depending on complexity and component availability.
Yes, provided we have access to documentation or the customer lets us produce one.

faq.q: Can the conveyor integrate with our MES/ERP?
faq.a: Yes. We deliver with OPC UA or a custom API per the customer's requirement.

capabilities: Process design from scratch around the task the machine has to solve
Mechanical design, pneumatics, control
Integration with vision systems for visual inspection
Pre-acceptance at our shop before shipping

specs.label: Cycle time
specs.value: from 2 s up to 5 min per task

faq.q: Can you take over a project from another supplier?
faq.a: Yes, provided the customer supplies documentation or consents to reverse engineering.
Yes. A prototype typically takes 8–12 weeks and serves as the basis for the production version.
Standard 24 months on mechanics, 12 months on electronics, extension to 5 years for a surcharge.

capabilities: Structural design compliant with EN 1090 and Eurocode
MAG, TIG, MIG welding under EN ISO 3834-2
Blasting and C3–C5 coatings in our own booth
Transport of oversized parts with escort vehicles

faq.q: Do you issue a Declaration of Performance?
faq.a: Yes, our EN 1090-1 certification covers it for load-bearing structures.
Yes, visual and PT in-house, RT/UT through a certified external partner.
Yes, we have an in-house assembly crew and mobile equipment for Central Europe.

capabilities: Integration of Yaskawa, KUKA, FANUC, ABB robots
Off-line programming in RoboGuide / RobotStudio
Cognex and Keyence vision systems for part orientation
Safety fencing and laser scanners

faq.q: Can we add a robot to an existing workstation?
faq.a: Usually yes. We audit the workstation, propose changes and handle integration.
We ship with our own HMI, programs handed over to the operator with minimal training.
Annual preventive check, VPN remote diagnostics, TCP calibration on every visit.

capabilities: Plate load capacity from 1 t to 20 t
Manual and CNC control synchronised with a robot
360° rotation and tilt up to 135°
Compatible with Lincoln Electric / ESAB positioners

faq.q: Can a positioner be added to an existing robot?
faq.a: Yes, we supply it with an interface compatible with the robot brand.
Standard sizes 8–12 weeks, custom sizes 16–20 weeks.

faq.q: Can it be used for plasma cutting?
faq.a: Yes, the positioner is universal — we use the same hardware for both welding and cutting.
